experiences.title: Full-stack Mobile Developer
experiences.subtitle: Online Car Marketplace Application
workDescription: Designed and developed a comprehensive mobile marketplace using **Flutter** and **Provider** for scalable state management.
Integrated **Firebase Authentication**, **Firestore**, and **Cloudinary** for secure user sessions and high-performance image hosting.
Established an automated **CI/CD pipeline** via **GitHub Actions** (Analyze, Test, Build), significantly reducing deployment errors and improving code reliability.

experiences.title: Team Leader - Full-stack Developer
experiences.subtitle: Stylo – AI-Powered Fashion Management
workDescription: Architected an end-to-end system integrating a **Flutter** mobile app with **ASP.NET Core Web API** and **SQL Server**.
Engineered and deployed a **TF-IDF based recommendation system** using **FastAPI** to provide personalized fashion suggestions.
Led the development team through effective task delegation, milestone management, and rigorous **code reviews** to ensure project quality.

experiences.title: Full-stack Developer
experiences.subtitle: BookStore – Desktop Management System
workDescription: Designed a robust **3-layer architecture** (GUI, BUS, DAL) using **WinForms (.NET)** to manage complex inventory and sales operations.
Implemented automated business logic for order processing, revenue tracking, and stock management with advanced filtering.
Developed professional reporting modules with **PDF export** functionality for invoices and analytics using **Spire.Office**.
